sourceTitle: Protecting Information When Using AI Tools
evidenceSnippetOriginal: Unless Brown has a contract for a specific service which protects our data, do not enter Level 2 or 3 data into publicly available or vendor-enabled AI tools.
evidenceLocator: Do not share sensitive information with Open AI tools section
